title: Modern Decor Wooden
description: This mod implements modern furniture like PCs, desks, keyboards, ergonomic chairs, neon lights, and wooden panels. Ideal for creating stylish offices, bedrooms, and minimalist spaces. Perfect for modern interior design in Minecraft.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0557a5127b2e4bfd8f149eceac78a1fe74362bf6.png)
Modern Decor Wooden is a mod with furniture, with wood paneling with a modern twist and furniture such as PC, desks, keyboards and Neon

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xKBydbdNyyA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

SETUPS and FURTNITURE with color variants
